programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: TBH 217
programme.desc: TBH 217

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Bradleys Sam Drucker Herby Charlie and Floyd are decorating the Cannonball for its annual Christmas Eve trip of caroling gift-giving and merriment around the valley but Homer Bedloe is determined to be a Scrooge and take possession of the train on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Munsters 101
programme.desc: Munsters 101

programme.title: Addams Family 122
programme.desc: Addams Family 122

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Trainee Captain Cunningham proves himself inept when his mistake strands Merrills tour group in a hurricane Jean Carter has mixed feelings about meeting her birth mother Isaac takes a cruise as a passenger and meets passenger Mara

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After Kim leaves her job to pursue her dream of writing a novel her husband David convinces her to make an erotic recording on a 976 number to bring in extra cash But Kim starts to have a mental breakdown when an obsessed caller begins murdering Meanwhile after reading Kims manuscript David wonders if Kim has herself assumed the murderous sexually deviant personality of the heroine of her novel

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is captured by a deranged scientist who uses an antique silver syringe to extract brain fluids from prostitutes

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Mchale 308
programme.desc: Mchale 308

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The retirement of the postman convinces Luke and Kate that Grandpa Amos should take it easier It backfires when Grandpa instead works too hard and ends up bedridden

programme.title: Smart 509
programme.desc: Smart 509

programme.title: Smart 505
programme.desc: Smart 505

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: An eccentric pop singer kidnaps beautiful blonde groupies and imprisons them in his mansion When Stacks disappears BJ goes undercover as a singer to find and free her

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaacs friends Mike and Lenore are successful and rich but workaholic Mike neglects his son Suzanne follows Frank who witnessed what happened to someone she cares about Shy Newton Weems dons a costume and kisses girls on board

programme.title: WKRP 108
programme.desc: WKRP 108

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.title: Hercules 203
programme.desc: Hercules 203

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelon Commonality is invaded and psychic Katya Petrenko is the prime suspect She tells Boone she knows about his secret activities and needs him

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Scouting for the army Cheyenne reports of an impending attack Fleeing to another fort the commanding officers route to that fort seems more dangerous than the alternate and Cheyenne isnt the only one who disagrees

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A small-time crook runs afoul of the police and the mob; guests Tom Bosley Sheree North Barry Atwater

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E04
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E04

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys prepare for the unveiling of a statue dedicated to family patriarch Tom prompting Victoria to visit Heaths birthplace and learn about Toms secret past

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Darcizzle
programme.desc: MIRACLE CATCH! We Should Have NEVER Caught this Massive SAILFISH! The Biggest Iandamp;#39;ve Ever Seen! Florida GATOR TROUT How to Catch, Clean andamp;amp; Cook"

programme.title: Darcizzle
programme.desc: Private video Florida Offshore Saltwater Live Bait Fishing ft. Bonito aka False Albacore SASHIMI for Lunch! Florida Offshore Saltwater Bottom Fishing ft. Weird "

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brandt Dewsberry came to MMA in an effort to learn to cope with his anger and selfishness. At HK34, in a match against Sergej Juskevic, he has to channel all of his new found skills to come out on top.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Mike Davis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Jessica Gladstone v. Lindsay Ball

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rodrigo Damm v. Kultar Singh Gill

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Salih Kulucan v. Ryan Scott

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter trades in his holographic powers for a powerful new blaster and learns that power isnt all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegade wreak havoc on Earth while disguised as Guardians and the terrified humans ask Leader-1 to take his people off Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Vantus sorcery continues Flora is still sick and very contagious They head for the planet Andarin with its powerful energy strong enough to save Flora Unfortunately they are heading right into a trap of Vantus They find the wizard Warp

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League discovers the Liberty Stone on Paxtar and once again they go in search of it hoping that its power will lead them to Audric Gillian alters their body structure so they can withstand the gravity pressure on Paxtar

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Gloria reports that Acapulcos resorts have turned into a scorching desert When MASK investigates they find VENOM working with a hotel owner who wants to make all the surrounding land worthless

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle!! Axe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Decayed Body

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands
